author: boyhowdy
body: “Uber-excellent”, eh? Thanks, both for myself, and on behalf of Denison, who has turned out to be a really nice guy as well as a great and visionary musician.

author: Burgo
body:
Heh. Well, I thought “uber-excellent” pretty much summed up my thoughts. Seriously though, the work you put out on Cover Lay Down is some of my favourite in the “music bloggers” field, and I’m a pretty voracious reader :P

Many thanks for stopping by :)

author: Rachel
body:
Great new tunes…  
That Gnarls Barkley video is brilliant…man.
